title: Seaside Swingers
writer: Anthony Marriott, Jeri Matos, James Hill
actors: John Leyton, Michael Sarne, Peter Birrell
plot: 1964 musical starring John Leyton, Mike Sarne, Freddie and the Dreamers, Ron Moody, Liz Fraser, Nicholas Parsons and Danny La Rue. A group of high-spirited teens find friendship, love and music.
